## Sprite Generation: Two Completely Separate Systems

There are two distinct visual systems for personas — **avatars** (profile images) and **sprites** (in-game pixel art characters). They are generated differently and used in different contexts.

---

### Avatars (profile images in Congress thread posts)

**Tool:** Python + Pillow (`PIL`), written entirely by hand. No DALL-E, no Stable Diffusion, no external AI image API.
